description: Conversation with maximum vagueness and zero commitment. 'Maybe sometime next week', 'we'll see', 'whenever makes sense', 'we'll figure it out' — no specific time, day, or confirmed intent.

mock_llm_response.summary: No actionable calendar events found. Every scheduling reference is hedged with maximum uncertainty: 'maybe', 'sometime', 'we'll see', 'whenever makes sense', 'we'll figure it out'. No specific time, day, or firm commitment is made by either party.

notes: Maximum vagueness pattern. The conversation is a social ritual of mutual deferral with no scheduling substance. 'Maybe sometime next week' is not schedulable — it lacks day, time, and bilateral commitment.
